sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 28:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 28:1
items.html: Because its phase four has no coarseness that is fit to draw the upper light. In that sense, it is regarded as the most refined of all the worlds (See answer 55). (Inner Observation, Item 13)
